# telemetry-anomdet

> Open-source, human-centric anomaly detection toolkit for spacecraft telemetry. It combines a stacking ensemble of classical and deep-learning detectors with per-channel SHAP attribution and pluggable LLM-generated diagnostic reports, behind a scikit-learn-compatible API.

Telemetry is long-form with columns `[timestamp, variable, value]` (the native NASA SMAP / ESA OPS-SAT format, ingested without schema transforms). Detectors follow the PyOD / scikit-learn convention: `fit` / `decision_function` / `predict` / `is_anomaly`, with `decision_scores_`, `threshold_`, `labels_` as post-fit attributes. The pipeline runs ingestion, preprocessing, windowed feature extraction, ensemble scoring, and (on the roadmap) SHAP attribution and LLM diagnostic reports, targeting the ground-station inter-pass window.

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/getting_started.html): install and first run
- [Pipeline Overview](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/user_guide/pipeline_overview.html): ingestion, preprocessing, feature extraction, detection, attribution, diagnosis
- [Real-Time Integration](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/user_guide/real_time_integration.html): streaming / inter-pass usage
- [Glossary](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/user_guide/glossary.html): key terms and conventions
- [Real-Time Example](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/tutorials/real_time_example.html): end-to-end tutorial

## API Reference

- [Ingest](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/api/ingest.html): `TelemetryDataset`, `load_smap`, `load_smap_labels`, `load_from_csv`
- [Preprocessing](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/api/preprocessing.html): `clean`, `dedupe`, `integrity_check`, `resample`, `interpolate_gaps`, `normalize_fit`, `pipeline`
- [Feature Extraction](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/api/feature_extraction.html): windowing and statistical features
- [BaseDetector](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/api/models/base.html): the shared detector interface
- [AnomalyEnsemble](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/api/models/ensemble.html): stacking combinator, `score_components()`
- [Unsupervised detectors](https://julioanzaldo.github.io/telemetry-anomdet/api/models/unsupervised.html): `PCAAnomaly`, `KMeansAnomaly`

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/JulioAnzaldo/telemetry-anomdet)
- [Citations](https://github.com/JulioAnzaldo/telemetry-anomdet/blob/main/CITATIONS.md): research the toolkit builds on
